title: Colorful Totem Flower Pot – 11x11 Cm Resin Face Planter | Indoor Outdoor Miniature Garden Sculpture | Holds Bonsai Plants Elegantly For Home Patio Lawn Garden Decor
features: Break-proof Material: Crafted from high-quality resin, this face planter ensures long-lasting performance with its strong and durable structure, resisting weather changes effectively for outdoor or indoor use
Eye-Catching Vibrancy: Crafted to maintain long-term vibrancy, the planter's fade-resistant coating and durable paintwork ensure a consistently bright appearance, adding charm to your space
Playful Outdoor Decor: Designed with a unique totem look, the face planter provides an imaginative touch, creating joy in gardens through its innovative and earth-ready structure

Warm Present: A thoughtful housewarming present and excellent decorative piece, this face planter is a great present idea suitable for holidays, adding charm and creativity to homes while complementing various interior looks effortlessly
Multi Uses: Perfect for plant lovers, this face planter blends into any setting, inside or outside the home, with adaptable decor options for diverse looks
description: Product Description Face Planter Pot This face planter combines and practicality, making it an excellent choice for displaying bonsai and floral arrangements. Constructed from resilient resin, it functions as a stylish holder or vase for various plants. Perfect for indoor and outdoor decor, it enhances patios, gardens, lawns, and living spaces with its unique appeal. Add character to your surroundings effortlessly. Specification Product: Flowerpot Material: Resin Product size: about 11x11cm/4.33x4.33 inches List 1 * face planter Note: Due to different lighting and screen settings, the item color may be slightly different from the picture. Due to different manual measurements, please allow a 1-2cm difference in size.
